name: Burning Vengeance
short_description: Burning Vengeance is an old school indie 3rd person shooter. Fast paced grim gritty shoutouts with underworld scum and other lowlifes. Shoot and slaughter your way through guts and blood to get some glory...
detailed_description:
Burning Vengeance is an old-school back to basics violent Third-Person-Shooter without rainbows and unicorns.

- Time restricted bullet time and psycho-mode for cineastic eye-for-an-eye confrontations
- Arcade point system to upgrade your character traits
- Fill your combo meter through killing guys in short succession to collect extra points
- Enjoy tons of findable guns
- Intuitive granade- and melee-system
- 58 Steam achievements for long-lasting action fun

Unapologetic fun for Boomers and Gen-X-MOFOs: Take your turn feeling good while shooting scumbags in the head!

Buy. It. Now! Please…

https://www.getshirts.de/index.php?page=shop&id=monkeynetics
